# third_party/flecs/

Vendored Flecs ECS upstream drop used by the gameplay runtime.

## Usage
- Read this file before scanning the folder in detail.
- If you open a child folder, read its `guideline.md` first when present.
- When files or folders in this directory change, update this file in the same change.

## Contents
- `LICENSE`: Flecs license text.
- `UPSTREAM.md`: Notes about the imported upstream version/source.
- `flecs.c`: Flecs C implementation compiled into the project.
- `flecs.h`: Flecs public header used by the runtime/site ECS code.
